The market fell quiet as Mira stopped just short of the fountain.

<details><summary>🗃️ Cast State</summary>
**Focus:** Mira — east_market; guarded; grey cloak; knuckles bruised; watching the player closely.
**Cast:** Draven — east arch; winded; hand on sword belt.
**Cast:** Innkeeper Bo — tavern steps; unhurt; shouting for the guard.
**Known pressure:** the sealed letter is still missing.
**<user>:** hood up; shallow cut on left forearm; standing by the fountain.
</details>
